titleStmt.title: SII 34.280: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 280. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the wall of the north verandah of the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Kulaśēkhara, 24th year, Chittirai = c. 13th Century.

The temple trustees of the Tiruvaraṅguḷam temple assigned some dēvadāna land as a vaidya-vṛitti and jīvita to a Ātrēyaṉ Tiruchchendār-mudaliyār Nimbavana Vayichchiyādarāyaṉ, a saravaṇan (physician) of Tirumarugal.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kulacEkara tEvaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 4 vatu cittirai mātam Irā
carācavaḷa nāṭṭu valla nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṅkuḷa muṭaiya ṉāyaṉār
kōyilil cīkāriyañ ceyvār cīmāyēśvarar kaṇkāṇi ceyvār tēvakaṉ
mikaḷ kōyil kaṇakkarum tirumarukal savaṇan Ātreyaṉ tiruccentār mutali
yār nimpavaṉa vaicciyātarāyarkku vaicciya pratti nilam Iṟaiyi
li kuṭutta kāṇiyāvatu valla nāṭṭu vayalil tēvatāṉamāṉa Ūṭutaṭiyil
paḷḷavāykkāl pōkkil vallattaraiyaṉ kuṭiyāṉ māyaṉ vaya
kkalum maḻavarāyap puṉṟavataraiyaṉum kāṉa nāṭṭaraiyaṉum kuṭiyā
ṉa kāñcirañcey Iraṇṭu varaikayilum kuṉṟavataraiyaṉ peṟṟāṉ ku
ṭiyāṉa paṭṭaṉ vayakkalum Āka taṭi Intakkāṇi Ivaṟkku can
tirāticcavarai cellumpaṭiyākavum Ikkāṇi Ivaṟku dānāthamana
vikrayaṅkaḷukkum Urittāvitākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu
nilaccīvitam Aṭaittu cantirāticcavaraiyāka kallum ve
ṭṭikkuṭuttōm mutaliyār nimpuvaṉa vayicciyātarāyaṟku tiruvara
ṅkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyilil cīkāriyañ ceyvārum cīmāyēśva
rar kaṇkāṇi ceyvārum tēvakaṉmikaḷum kōyilk kaṇakka
rum Ivvaṉai Aracāṇṭār Eḻuttu poṉmāḷikaippiḷḷai Eḻuttu
civañāṉapaṇṭitar Eḻuttu tirumāḷikaippiḷḷai Eḻuttu tiruakampaṭippiḷḷai Eḻuttu
kōṭṭaiyūr vēḷār paṭṭar Eḻuttu kōyilkkaṇakku valla nāṭṭu vēḷār Eḻuttu
māṭāpattiyam ni tanāta tāṇṭār Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.280 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
